title: Run FediTest conformance suite against broadside
description: FediTest (https://feditest.org, github.com/fediverse-devnet/feditest) is the most comprehensive AP conformance suite. NLnet-funded, actively maintained. Sets up a constellation of nodes and runs interop tests. Clone feditest-tests-fediverse repo, configure broadside as a node, run the test suite, fix failures.
close_reason: FediTest requires UBOS container runtime for full AP tests. WebFinger tests pass. Full federation testing deferred to deployment with stable domain.
